# UIPro Design Plan Template

## 1. Screen Goal

- What is this screen trying to help the user do?

## 2. User Intent

- Primary user
- Primary action
- Why this screen matters

## 3. Visual Direction

- Product type
- Tone
- Style keywords
- Color direction
- Typography direction

## 4. Layout Structure

- Page shell
- Section order
- Navigation model
- Density level

## 5. Components

- Required components
- Component priority
- Reusable patterns

## 6. Interaction States

- default
- hover
- focus
- active
- disabled

## 7. Data States

- empty
- loading
- error
- success

## 8. Responsive Behavior

- desktop behavior
- tablet behavior
- mobile behavior

## 9. Accessibility Rules

- keyboard
- contrast
- semantic structure
- motion caution

## 10. Copy Guidance

- heading tone
- button style
- feedback message tone

## 11. Anti-Patterns

- do not use
- avoid visual mistakes
- avoid interaction mistakes

## 12. Developer Handoff Notes

- implementation order
- QA checklist
- known tradeoffs
